# EcommX AI — eCommerce Integration

> Connect your store to EcommX AI so AI agents can discover products, inventory, categories, and drive
> checkout. How you connect depends on your platform: Shopify / WooCommerce connect with an API key
> (no code); a custom / in-house store implements 5 REST endpoints. You don't change your storefront.

## Start
- [Choose your platform](docs/00-choose-your-platform.md): decision table — Shopify vs WooCommerce vs custom REST.

## Common (all platforms)
- [Register](docs/common/register.md): the sign-up wizard.
- [Your domain](docs/common/your-domain.md): a *.ecommxai.com subdomain, or your own domain via DNS (TXT + CNAME).
- [Go live](docs/common/go-live.md): test the connection.

## Connect by platform
- [Shopify](docs/platforms/shopify/connect.md): Admin API token (shpat_…), no code.
- [WooCommerce](docs/platforms/woocommerce/connect.md): REST consumer key/secret (ck_/cs_), no code.
- [Custom REST](docs/platforms/custom-rest/overview.md): implement 5 endpoints.

## Custom REST (the only path that writes code)
- [OpenAPI 3.1 spec](openapi/custom-rest.v1.yaml): source of truth for all request/response shapes.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): rules and the fastest correct path for AI coding agents.
- [Node starter](examples/merchant-starter-node) / [Python starter](examples/merchant-starter-python): runnable; swap the data provider for your catalog.

## Key invariants (custom REST)
- Money: price.amount is a decimal string ("189.00"), currency is ISO-4217.
- SKU is the primary key; inventory 0 = out of stock, omit unknown SKUs.
- Auth: Bearer token, merchant → platform; /health needs no auth.
